requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — AMANORM / CREE / Donor Procurement Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——AMANORM / CREE / 捐助方采购要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——AMANORM / CREE / 捐助方採購要求

summary.en: Mali's standards framework through AMANORM adopts IEC standards, including IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to and including 16 A per phase) as applicable norms for PV inverter EMC compliance. CREE and EDM-SA, when reviewing technical documentation for grid-tied PV project licence applications and connection approvals, reference IEC-based EMC evidence consistent with the AMANORM IEC adoption framework. Donor and lender procurement specifications (World Bank, AfDB, EU/EDF) for Mali solar projects typically require IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 EMC evidence as part of inverter conformity documentation. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment covering both conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, and harmonic limits for PV inverters. No standalone AMANORM-specific EMC Technical Regulation uniquely for solar inverters has been identified; EMC requirements are embedded in the IEC-referenced equipment standards and project-level lender specifications.
summary.zh: 马里通过AMANORM建立的标准框架采用IEC标准，包括IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备谐波电流排放限值），作为光伏逆变器EMC合规的适用规范。CREE和EDM-SA在审核并网光伏项目许可申请和接入审批的技术文件时，参照与AMANORM IEC采用框架一致的IEC EMC证据。马里太阳能项目的捐助方和贷款方采购规格（世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟/欧洲发展基金）通常要求IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2 EMC证据作为逆变器合格评定文件的一部分。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，涵盖光伏逆变器的传导和辐射排放、抗扰度及谐波限值。目前尚未发现专门针对太阳能逆变器的独立AMANORM特定EMC技术法规；EMC要求包含在IEC参考设备标准和项目级贷款方规格中。
summary.zht: 馬里通過AMANORM建立的標準框架採用IEC標準，包括IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備諧波電流排放限值），作為光伏逆變器EMC合規的適用規範。CREE和EDM-SA在審核併網光伏項目許可申請和接入審批的技術文件時，參照與AMANORM IEC採用框架一致的IEC EMC證據。馬里太陽能項目的捐助方和貸款方採購規格（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟/歐洲發展基金）通常要求IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2 EMC證據作為逆變器合格評定文件的一部分。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，涵蓋光伏逆變器的傳導和輻射排放、抗擾度及諧波限值。目前尚未發現專門針對太陽能逆變器的獨立AMANORM特定EMC技術法規；EMC要求包含在IEC參考設備標準和項目級貸款方規格中。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (adopted via AMANORM IEC framework as applicable norm; referenced in donor/lender procurement specifications)

IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (applicable for grid-tied PV inverters; referenced in IEC-aligned project specifications)

IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker (applicable where inverter output creates voltage fluctuation on the low-voltage network)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements referenced to China's domestic EMC framework (GB/T 17626 series and GB/T 14549 for harmonic current limits). GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series methods used in Chinese domestic standards, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope, referenced limits, and test conditions are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as adopted through AMANORM and applied by donors and lenders in Mali. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for AMANORM conformity, CREE project submissions, or donor/lender-financed Mali solar projects.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，包含参照中国国内EMC框架（GB/T 17626系列和GB/T 14549谐波电流限值）的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了中国国内标准中使用的IEC 61000系列方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围、引用限值和测试条件未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调，后者通过AMANORM采用并被马里捐助方和贷款方应用。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被AMANORM合格评定、CREE项目提交或捐助方/贷款方融资的马里太阳能项目接受为IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，包含參照中國國內EMC框架（GB/T 17626系列和GB/T 14549諧波電流限值）的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了中國國內標準中使用的IEC 61000系列方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍、引用限值和測試條件未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調，後者通過AMANORM採用並被馬里捐助方和貸款方應用。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被AMANORM合格評定、CREE項目提交或捐助方/貸款方融資的馬里太陽能項目接受為IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters — includes EMC requirements; not harmonised with IEC 62920)
GB/T 14549-1993 — 电能质量 公用电网谐波 (Power quality — Harmonics for public supply systems — Chinese domestic harmonic standard)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy AMANORM, CREE, or donor/lender IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for Mali. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model and power rating; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for models with input current up to 16 A per phase; (c) IEC 61000-3-3 voltage fluctuation and flicker test evidence where the inverter's grid output may cause voltage fluctuations on the low-voltage Mali EDM-SA distribution network. Additionally, in Mali's Sahel environment, EMC test conditions should address elevated operating temperatures — EMC performance can degrade at high ambient temperatures and should be characterised or at minimum discussed with the test laboratory. French-language versions of EMC test reports (or certified translations) are required for francophone Mali regulatory and procurement submissions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足马里的AMANORM、CREE或捐助方/贷款方IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号和功率等级的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）每相输入电流不超过16 A型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告；（c）逆变器电网输出可能在马里EDM-SA低压配电网引起电压波动时的IEC 61000-3-3电压波动和闪变测试证据。此外，在马里萨赫勒环境下，EMC测试条件应考虑高运行温度——EMC性能在高环境温度下可能下降，应进行表征或至少与测试实验室讨论。法语版EMC测试报告（或经认证翻译）是法语马里监管和采购提交所必需的。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足馬里的AMANORM、CREE或捐助方/貸款方IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號和功率等級的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）每相輸入電流不超過16 A型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告；（c）逆變器電網輸出可能在馬里EDM-SA低壓配電網引起電壓波動時的IEC 61000-3-3電壓波動和閃變測試證據。此外，在馬里薩赫勒環境下，EMC測試條件應考慮高運行溫度——EMC性能在高環境溫度下可能下降，應進行表徵或至少與測試實驗室討論。法語版EMC測試報告（或經認證翻譯）是法語馬里監管和採購提交所必需的。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 EMC evidence mandatory in practice for CREE/EDM-SA grid-tied project submissions and donor/lender-financed solar projects in Mali under the AMANORM IEC adoption framework; IEC 61000-3-3 evidence required where low-voltage network flicker is a concern; French-language documentation mandatory for Mali regulatory submissions
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing satisfies requirements for voluntary Chinese CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters and not accepted as IEC 62920 equivalent by Mali

source.publisher: IEC — International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC 62920, IEC 61000-3-2 primary source; adopted by AMANORM as Mali national norms)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy AMANORM, CREE, or donor/lender IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for Mali. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before project submission. Consider EMC performance characterisation at elevated ambient temperatures (45–50 °C) for Sahel field conditions. Obtain French-language test documentation. Verify current AMANORM IEC edition adoption status and project-specific lender EMC specification requirements directly with AMANORM and the project implementing agency before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足马里的AMANORM、CREE或捐助方/贷款方IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在项目提交前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。考虑在萨赫勒现场条件下（45–50 °C）高环境温度下的EMC性能表征。取得法语测试文件。在启动测试计划前，直接向AMANORM和项目实施机构核实AMANORM现行IEC版本采用状态和项目特定贷款方EMC规格要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足馬里的AMANORM、CREE或捐助方/貸款方IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在項目提交前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。考慮在薩赫勒現場條件下（45–50 °C）高環境溫度下的EMC性能表徵。取得法語測試文件。在啟動測試計畫前，直接向AMANORM和項目實施機構核實AMANORM現行IEC版本採用狀態和項目特定貸款方EMC規格要求。
